assertions.description: IdentityCredential is exposed for FedCM sign-in results.
navigator.credentials.get is callable for FedCM mode requests.
credentials.get accepts identity.mode set to passive and returns a Promise.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const ctrl=new AbortController();const p=navigator.credentials.get({identity:{providers:[{configURL:'https://example.com/fedcm.json',clientId:'client'}],mode:'passive'},signal:ctrl.signal});ctrl.abort();return p instanceof Promise;}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: credentials.get accepts identity.mode set to active for button/use-other-account flows.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const ctrl=new AbortController();const p=navigator.credentials.get({identity:{providers:[{configURL:'https://example.com/fedcm.json',clientId:'client'}],mode:'active'},signal:ctrl.signal});ctrl.abort();return p instanceof Promise;}catch(_){return false;}})()

assertions.description: AbortSignal is exposed so relying parties can cancel active FedCM dialogs.
A use-other-account FedCM dialog state can represent a signed-out IdP and alternate account row.
